assertions.text: Headline leads with reader benefit, not newsletter brand name or generic claim
Value proposition differentiator is specific to this newsletter and cannot be copy-pasted onto a competitor's page
CTA button text is more specific than just 'Subscribe'
Ask names the specific type of person the subscriber should think of sharing with
Pre-written share copy sounds like something a human would actually send
Section ends with a clear mechanism: a link placeholder, forward instruction, or both
